name: Mile High Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 16 Graham crackers, 2 pieces, each approximately 2 inches square
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Graham crackers in a blender or with a rolling pin and transfer to a pie plate.
2. Melt the Margarine and stir into the cracker crumbs, pressing the mixture evenly over the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, combine Sugar, Egg whites, Vanilla extract, and Lemon juice; beat at medium speed for 15 minutes or until the mixture is stiff.
4. Fold in Whipped topping and finely chopped Peaches.
5. Pile the mixture lightly into the prepared crumb shell.
6. Chill for 1 1/2 hours before serving.
NUTRITION PER SERVING: 227 calories, 71% carbohydrate, 4% protein, 25% fat
